subparts.text: What is FDI and how is it different from FPI?
Define any one international business theory.
Mention any two effects of globalization on business.
What is meant by Distinctive Competitive Advantage?
Mention any two components of Global Human Resource Management.

questions.question_text: Explain the scope and challenges of international business in the current global context.
Discuss the role of international financial institutions like IMF, World Bank and IDA in facilitating international business.
Explain the process of technology transfer and its impact on global business competitiveness.
Critically analyze whether imposing tariffs will help the U.S. achieve long-term competitive advantage in international business.
Describe the different types of strategies used by global organizations to achieve a competitive advantage.
Explain the concept of financial integration and its implications for international businesses.
As a manager, what strategies would you implement to effectively manage cultural differences and ensure smooth collaboration across the international team? Support your answers with examples.
Explain the process and challenges of managing human resources in a global environment. Include selection, development and motivation in your answer.
